# ASIMOV-AI
> AI Risk Assessment & Governance for Enterprise and SME

## What ASIMOV-AI Is
ASIMOV-AI (asimov-ai.org) is an AI governance consultancy providing structured risk assessment and audit services for organisations implementing AI. We serve enterprise clients and SMEs across all sectors, with particular depth in regulated industries.

## What We Provide
- 251-control AI governance audit framework
- Three Lines of Defence model (L1 Delivery, L2 Risk/Governance, L3 Audit/Assurance)
- Crawl-Walk-Run-Fly AI maturity assessment
- EU AI Act compliance gap analysis and remediation planning
- NIST AI RMF alignment assessment
- ISO 42001 readiness evaluation
- Board-level AI risk reporting
- Rapid 5-minute AI risk scoring tool

## Regulatory Frameworks We Cover
- EU AI Act (high-risk system classification, August 2026 deadline)
- UK GDPR / ICO AI guidance
- SRA principles (for legal sector clients)
- FCA Consumer Duty and SM&CR (for financial services clients)
- ICAEW, ACCA, FRC standards (for accountancy clients)
- ARB, RIBA standards (for architecture clients)
- RICS standards (for surveying clients)

## Team
- Rajiv Abeysinghe — AI Strategy & Automation, AWS Solutions Architect, founder
- Dr Nick Lockett — Dual-qualified barrister-solicitor, AI governance and IP law, founder of CAAIRO
- Sushila Nair — CISSP, Independent Cybersecurity Adviser

## Relationship to AI Integrity
ASIMOV-AI provides formal governance audits. AI Integrity (ai-integ.com) provides a community-led implementation platform for SME professional services firms. The book "The Digital Law Firm" (Law Society Publishing, Q4 2026) provides the content foundation for both.

## Contact
- Website: https://asimov-ai.org
- Email: info@asimov-ai.org
- Community: https://ai-integ.com
